ground_truth.title: Sneakers: Latest Sneaker News, Release Dates & Guides
ground_truth.main_content: Complex Sneakers is the daily destination for sneakerheads. Find the latest on sneaker news, release dates, exclusive collaborations, collections & more. Featured article: The Best Air Jordans of 2025 by Zac Dubasik. Highlights include: The Best Nike Air Foamposite Pros of All Time, Ranked by Ian Stonebrook; Sneaker Release Guide featuring 'Souvenir' Vans Old Skool and 'Bugs Bunny' Air Jordan 8; 'Jurassic Park' x Nike Ja 3 Collab Surfaces by Victor Deng. Latest Cover: Yeat - Pray Love cover story. New Arrivals products: BAPE SK8 STA #1 MENS ($329) and ARIES x Salomon XT-Whisper Black Complex.
with: Complex Sneakers is the daily destination for sneakerheads.
The Best Air Jordans of 2025 - 'Black Cat' Air Jordan 4? Travis Scott x Fragment x Air Jordan 1 Low? Awake NY x Air Jordan 5? Here's how they rank.
The Best Nike Air Foamposite Pros of All Time, Ranked by Ian Stonebrook.
'Souvenir' Vans Old Skool, 'Bugs Bunny' Air Jordan 8, and Other Sneakers Releasing This Week.
Yeat is an artist who believes in constant evolution. As he steps into a new era, he's transformed himself both mentally and physically.

items.caption: 2025 Complex Cover of Yeat - Yeat is an artist who believes in constant evolution. As he steps into a new era, he's transformed himself both mentally and physically, and he's making the best, most mind-bending music of his career.
